channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: With MSTR concerns assuaged, look to traditional signals around BTC
item.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, FalconX’s Gaspar Martin writes that BTC is reaching a market bottom and is poised for a turnaround.

item.title: Crypto VC Paradigm launches $1.2 billion AI fund as it broadens beyond digital assets: BBG
item.description: The firm's latest fund backs AI and robotics startups but leadership says it remains committed to crypto investing.

item.title: Kraken Wins $22M From Auditor That Abandoned It During Operation Choke Point 2.0
item.description: The crypto exchange says an arbitrator sided with it after accounting firm Mazars walked away from a nearly finished audit.

item.title: Dinari, tZERO join forces on turnkey platform for tokenized U.S. equities
item.description: The move comes as firms race to build the infrastructure for blockchain-based stocks and debate how tokenized stocks should work.

item.title: Adam Back's BSTR scraps SPAC merger, seeks new deal
item.description: BSTR and Cantor Equity Partners will not complete their merger under the original July 2025 agreement, with the shareholder postponed indefinitely.

item.title: BNB Chain is building a new layer-1 for high-frequency trading and AI agents
item.description: The network aims to process over 100,000 transactions per second by streaming them directly, eliminating public queues to make trades faster and more secure.

item.title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
item.description: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

item.title: India crypto tax filings lag trading activity: Report
item.description: India’s tax department reportedly found that fewer than a quarter of the 645,000 people who made crypto transactions reported them on tax returns.

item.title: The 5 types of real world assets being tokenized fastest onchain
item.description: Tokenized Real World Assets span treasuries, real estate, stocks, commodities and private credit. The sector is still small in TradFi terms but it's growing very, very fast.

item.title: Kazakhstan president signs decree to accelerate crypto adoption
item.description: Kazakhstan targets gas-powered electricity for mining, income tax exemptions for regulated crypto transactions and cross-border stablecoin payments in a new decree signed by the president.

item.title: BTC speculators in focus as analysis says 'textbook Bitcoin bottom' is underway
item.description: Analysis flagged a Bitcoin moving average derivative that last triggered at the end of the 2022 bear market as BTC price action returned to its reversal zone.

item.title: Morning Minute: Vanguard Hires 'Head of Digital Assets' in Crypto Capitulation
item.description: Crypto majors fall as the U.S. strikes Iran, ending the ceasefire. Vanguard opens its doors. And a meme coin frenzy erupts on Robinhood chain.

item.title: Citadel abandons multi-year crypto lawsuit to focus on bankruptcy order against an ex-employee
item.description: After winning a 6 million-pound London arbitration award, Citadel dropped its U.S. trade secrets case, saying another judgment would likely go uncollected.

item.title: SpaceX's first bitcoin wallet movements in six months likely don't signal sales
item.description: Onchain trackers found the newly public company shifted a tiny amount of bitcoin between its own addresses. Nothing reached an exchange.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bankers Filed Suspicious Activity Report Over Farage's £5M Gift From Tether Billionaire
item.description: The report, filed in May 2024, invited the National Crime Agency to determine whether there were grounds for further investigation.

item.title: Lyn Alden says Bitcoin needs no savior as Strategy sells $216M of BTC
item.description: Bitcoin-focused macroeconomist Lyn Alden said BTC must stand on its own as Strategy sold 3,588 BTC, while warning about leverage risks tied to STRC.

item.title: Mobile app Toss and blockchain Optimism to conduct Korean won stablecoin POC: report
item.description: Toss has reportedly partnered with Optimism and Sunnyside Labs for a proof of concept on the feasibility of a Korean won-based stablecoin for payments.

item.title: Bitcoin's inflation quagmire gets stickier as renewed MidEast conflict sends oil price soaring
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 8, 2026

item.title: ESMA turns spotlight on crypto custody risks after MiCA transition
item.description: The EU securities regulator will assess custody providers’ key management, incident response and reliance on third-party technology providers.

item.title: Kalshi files same-day appeal of NY court's rejection of bid to block state gambling law enforcement
item.description: Kalshi appealed to the Second Circuit after a New York federal judge denied its request to block state gambling officials from enforcing local laws against its sports event contracts.

item.title: Crypto and stocks tumble after Trump declares ceasefire 'over' following Iran strikes
item.description: Bitcoin fell, altcoins slid after Trump said the ceasefire with Iran is "over" as U.S. and Iran traded airstrikes.

item.title: Berachain hard fork to replace dual-token model with WBERA rewards
item.description: Berachain launched the first stage of its PoL Next upgrade, which will phase out the BGT token and shift the network's reward system to WBERA.

item.title: 🇯🇵 JAPAN: BITCOIN AND XRP ARE BECOMING CORPORATE TREASURY ASSETS SBI VC Trade says Japanese firms are adding BTC and XRP to their balance sheets as the yen continues to lose purchasing power. Its registered accounts across VCTRAD - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBhNHM0bTdHYUpVRjc2dzVVaVA3M2FWVGpUeEJYSjlSUG9TOGoyaV9fSUg5NGI0STRVUTh0ZU1jVFZvTGU0eGtsNkdTc3B0eEZqWkhnWDNFS2p1djlSc3RsTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🇯🇵 JAPAN: BITCOIN AND XRP ARE BECO…

item.title: Reserve Bank of India still favors crypto prohibition to curtail tax evasion: Reuters
item.description: Indian regulators maintained a hawkish stance despite the growing embrace of digital assets and technology by governments worldwide.

item.title: For the 3 months April 6 to July 6, 2026, we increased our Bitcoin holdings 10% to 843,775 Bitcoin, increased our USD reserve 13% to $2.55B, and more than doubled YTD BTC Yield from 3.7% to 7.8%. $MSTR $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE1VcmlOOVVtQmVMcmVzMVZvaHlPUFR1NWV1VTdpVU43RWFuN1NjSXJ0UF81Q0ZDMjc2UjBycEhXRjBKNV9objVfYUFRazV0VmFRbGxiTVpTTk56VlZm?oc=5" target="_blank">For the 3 months April 6 to July 6, 2026, …

item.title: Base to activate B20 standard for stablecoins, RWAs and other tokens
item.description: Base is scheduled to activate its B20 token standard on Wednesday at 6 pm UTC, allowing developers to begin creating native tokens on the network.

item.title: Validators embrace XRP Ledger's recent upgrade. But not everyone’s on board yet
item.description: The new software leads among the network's validators, yet by node count it sits behind the older v3.1.3, and the security amendment bundled with it remains a separate, slower vote. The upgrade needs 80% of the trusted validator list to ac…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Bitcoin falls under $62,000 after President Trump says MoU with Iran is over. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5mMUFNR2VmN1U5eXNmanJVTmdieExlUG40eVJ1M29mdEFtTVFjZHZkZVloRzhHU3lpVnFzak5HZHJiQmNFRFhLQlVXT0x1R0hWRVQyZzdpYzRLYUFScUhUNWZn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Bitcoin falls un…

item.title: 🇮🇳BREAKING: INDIA’S CENTRAL BANK IS BACKING A CRYPTO BAN The RBI wants India’s crypto policy to "lean toward prohibition", warning of risks to financial stability and monetary sovereignty. Reuters says it also wants banks blocked from holding, tradi - x.com

item.title: JUST IN: 🇮🇳 India's central bank backs crypto ban. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE55RGp5cF9OX0thYzFEOUtvSHNiTDI5WkEtZDdpLXNiX0hRTnNlYnRULXU1V1owcEM0MkFJNXdLOVBqQkFNdXJFTkRiN04tUzMyOWY3alR6OGp3UHB5Rzl3Z1l3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇮🇳 India's central bank…

item.title: 🚨 NEW: Bitcoin and Ethereum exchange supplies are near historic lows, with BTC's lowest since 2017, ETH's since 2015, signaling stronger investor conviction, per Santiment. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9VSGJDeHo2aEFlem1aQ2FGUGJRUFBjdGF0R0tBWG0zM1ZfRHVzZHFJSnB4Y0wxb0o4X2tFU3V1N1hwQ0FFTlNtNHNHZk51dkRiMVFucDFOeXZkaVMteXZhRVFCVUo?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NEW: Bitcoin and Ethereum ex…

item.title: EU to again vote to extend ‘chat control’ rules
item.description: So-called “chat control” rules could be revived in the EU, with lawmakers again set to vote on the legislation Thursday.

item.title: StarkWare CEO suggests 4% annual Bitcoin inflation to replace 21M cap
item.description: StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson argued that Bitcoin private keys get lost over time, meaning the amount of usable Bitcoin will diminish. Many disagree.

item.title: Swyftx eyes crypto payments after securing Australian license
item.description: Swyftx interim co-CEO Andrea Yuen says the company "won’t be a pure crypto spot exchange in future,” after it secured a license allowing it to offer payment services.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin drops to $62,000, stocks slide, oil soars as Iran ceasefire collapses
item.description: Hedge funds have turned the most bearish on the yen since 2007, boosting bets on further losses to nearly 138,000 contracts as of June 30.

item.title: Bitcoin under pressure as Trump says Iran ceasefire is over
item.description: Major cryptocurrencies are trading in the red as renewed U.S.-Iran airstrikes push oil higher.

item.title: Secret Network cites AI exploit risks in proposed Arbitrum move
item.description: “The security risk is the part we take most seriously,” the team said, citing old code and AI exploit risks.

item.title: JUST IN: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev says the Robinhood crypto blockchain is "great for memes." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1MWFBkUWwwQmNjRGxDbjJ2NzZCVFBRRVZ1WkxueF81V2JTNm9VWkFhXzJHdS1ocmdpd2pnMzJSOUt2MU1OcEN3akhhSHAzeXdCWWhQanFiOGdRNXlCRTFGYVFB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev …

item.title: CFTC charges commodity, crypto pool operator with $14M fraud
item.description: The CFTC has launched a rare crypto-related enforcement action against a commodity pool operator that allegedly defrauded investors of more than $14 million.

item.title: Strike launches ‘volatility-proof’ Bitcoin loans amid bear market, but at a cost
item.description: The cost of eliminating margin calls and forced liquidations is an interest rate as high as 14.2% and an obligation to pay on time, Strike CEO Jack Mallers said.

item.title: Polymarket Integrates Spark for Instant Bitcoin Lightning Deposits According to BitcoinMagazine, Polymarket has officially enabled instant deposits via the Bitcoin Lightning Network, powered by the Spark payment protocol. Unlike the previous model, which re - x.com

item.title: ⚡️ LUMMIS: "The Clarity Act is not just a “crypto bill”. It’s a decision about whether America leads the next financial system or watches from the sidelines." Can CLARITY pass before the Senate leaves for summer recess? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE56dDlWd3M0YjF2RW0zWF9vS2hEMTNHUzR3ZUNNQU12N1haTXN3QlJNZ092ZVZuTEhvVkJOdm5uT0pxTE1JZDhjQmd0UXhBMW5mVE9tdkNVZ3NudVpzYmhGbXdKNWU?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ LUMMIS: "The Clarity Act is …

item.title: Anthropic Removes Hidden Claude Code Tracker After Researchers Raise Privacy Concerns
item.description: The company says the tool was designed to stop abuse and AI model extraction, but critics questioned the use of undisclosed monitoring.

item.title: SEC's Long-Promised Crypto Safe Harbor to Be Introduced as Soon as This Month
item.description: The SEC updated its agenda to indicate that a key crypto rulemaking is slated to be released for public comment in July.

item.title: SEC crypto rule changes are high on its 2026 agenda
item.description: The financial regulator’s agenda included proposed rule changes related to crypto broker-dealers, digital assets on national securities exchanges and potential safe harbors.

item.title: Tether Invests $20 Million in Mercado Bitcoin to Fuel Expansion Across Latin America
item.description: Brazilian crypto exchange Mercado Bitcoin has raised $20 million in fresh investment from USDT stablecoin issuer Tether.

item.title: Ether climbs toward $2K as Bitmine buys ETH, Robinhood L2 boost
item.description: ETH charts a path toward $2,000 as TradFi adoption, DAT buying and a long-awaited network upgrade boost investor interest.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC released its regulatory agenda for 2026 with a crypto regulation meeting set for this month 👀 "To help clarify the regulatory framework for crypto assets and provide greater certainty to the market" 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1pWExYZkEtY004V0ludUhkSTJPeW1MbUpXS1ZSTkpxU0ZLb2dvVUNXMEF6X0VjOExOVmJJYWNFYUtXNWJGUl9QM3RQWEdoR0pOWVBnb0VoMDFZcGw2cWM1dnpvd2Z4YTA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC released …

item.title: some personal news: this is my last week contributing full time to the ethereum foundation. 4 years ago, i did my first ethereum hackathon and have been working in the ecosystem ever since. i loved that you could make money contributing to open source while - x.com

item.title: AI Is Changing the Workplace and Universities Aren’t Keeping Up, Study Warns
item.description: A University of Manchester researcher says schools should move beyond AI cheating concerns and prepare graduates for workplaces increasingly shaped by automation.

item.title: BIG3 NFT Buyers Sue Ice Cube's Basketball League Over Alleged Unfulfilled Promises
item.description: Investors who purchased BIG3 NFTs expected the perks of team ownership, but allege "deceptive, fraudulent" marketing was at play.

item.title: China May Be Following US Lead With Quiet Crackdown on AI Exports
item.description: China is reportedly building the same power to cut off its AI that the US deployed against Anthropic in June.

item.title: BlackRock-backed Securitize slides 40% after SPAC debut despite tokenization boom
item.description: The decline fits into a pattern of recently-public digital asset companies sliding after debut, Arca's Jeff Dorman said.

item.title: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
item.description: Built on Signal’s open-source technology, Radar Chat combines encrypted messaging with self-custodial Bitcoin payments via Lightning Network.

item.title: Crypto exchange Kraken is trying to become a bank in Europe
item.description: Kraken's focus is on Lithuania as the jurisdiction to secure the license, according to a person familiar with the plans.

item.title: The Clarity Act is not just a “crypto bill”. It’s a decision about whether America leads the next financial system or watches from the sidelines. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE01SlJSN05jNzlCQld6cFhBTWNvQXJFZjVabG5OUjB3b3FoRTBScXBpXzlfdnVlNW1WbVkzekJ1RWI5cHJiNnpOVnZPR25POS1iRE1NdnVlVWJYYnJ0ZzVJ?oc=5" target="_blank">The Clarity Act is not just a “crypto …

item.title: Kenya's Markets Regulator Seeks Blockchain Tool to Track Crypto Crime
item.description: The Capital Markets Authority wants to monitor over 20 blockchains for fraud, laundering, and sanctions evasion under Kenya's new crypto law.

item.title: Wintermute Cautions 'Relief Rally' Likely as Bitcoin Touches Highest Price in Weeks
item.description: Market maker Wintermute remains cautious, suggesting that recent Bitcoin action is a relief rally rather than a fundamental market change.

item.title: Introducing volatility-proof loans by @Strike: bitcoin-backed loans the price can never liquidate. No margin calls. No price liquidations. No matter how far bitcoin falls, your bitcoin doesn't move. Volatility is inevitable. Liquidation isn't. Borrow dollars. Keep the bit - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1PemlEdGlaTUhZQ0o1T3NSWGtHRDJwSTIxcVFBNlZObUhMN3d5Y3U3bm5pS1ozTG9QX050QmRUaWhpRW83ZGlvUHQyVjlHLXdtamVhMnJZQTUyTERNMXJjazZB?oc=5" target="_blank">Introducing volatility-proof loans…
